name_cn:
Mini
Tote latest Autumn/Winter Series, finally a shoulder strap version. A tote that frees your hands. Exquisite Rouy Tiger, embellished with letter logo, exquisite craftsmanship, paired with adjustable and detachable shoulder strap, greatly improving practicality. Looks high-end and casual when worn
size:21.5*13*7.5cm
